title: Superdense Coding: Two Bits from One Qubit
description: Learn how to transmit two classical bits of information using only one qubit and a pre-shared entangled pair. Understand the duality with quantum teleportation and the fundamental role of entanglement in quantum communication.
learningObjectives: Explain the superdense coding protocol step by step
Implement the encoding and decoding operations
Understand the resource trade-off with quantum teleportation
Calculate the classical capacity of quantum channels
Prove that entanglement doubles the classical capacity
Compare superdense coding with classical communication
